option.leafenhanced.fallingLeaves.toolti: Spawn falling leaf particles under leaf blocks in deciduous biomes.
option.leafenhanced.particleChance.toolt: Probability that a candidate leaf block emits a particle each tick.
Upper limit on how many particles can be spawned per tick.
option.leafenhanced.particleRenderDistan: Horizontal radius around the player in which particles can spawn.
option.leafenhanced.baseWindStrength.too: How much wind affects falling leaves.
option.leafenhanced.windSounds.tooltip: Play ambient wind cues during gusts.
option.leafenhanced.leafLitterAccumulati: Leaves drop layered leaf litter on the ground over time.
option.leafenhanced.accumulationChance.t: Base chance per leaf random tick to create or thicken litter.
option.leafenhanced.maxLayers.tooltip: Maximum thickness of layered leaf litter (1-4).
option.leafenhanced.disappearanceTicks.t: Average number of random ticks before one layer decays.
option.leafenhanced.leafLitterShovelColl: Punch leaf litter with a shovel to remove a layer and drop an item.
